before.description: Stay warm during North Indian winters with this heavy-duty padded jacket from FabricIndia. Crafted from premium water-resistant polyester with a thick thermal lining, it is designed for temperatures down to 5 degrees Celsius. Perfect for morning commutes, bike rides, or trips to Manali and Shimla. This jacket features a high-neck collar, two zippered side pockets, and a detachable hood for versatile styling. Ideal for layering over sweaters or sweatshirts. To maintain the insulation, dry clean only or gentle hand wash. A must-have essential for the modern Indian man seeking style and functionality in extreme cold.
before.title: Men's Heavy Padded Winter Jacket with Detachable Hood - Navy Blue
